inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age for estimating maximum heart rate (220 - age) if max HR is not directly measured

inputs.label: Resting Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Resting heart rate measured in the morning

inputs.label: Maximum Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Maximum heart rate; if unknown, use 220 - age

inputs.label: Intensity Lower Limit
inputs.businessContext: Lower percentage of heart rate reserve for the target training zone

inputs.label: Intensity Upper Limit
inputs.businessContext: Upper percentage of heart rate reserve for the target training zone
